caption: A man with a grey, spiked wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio for a podcast. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. In front of him is a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on racks, including a shirt with the text "LEE" on it. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left and right sides of the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. He starts by resting his arms on the table, then begins to move his right hand, and finally raises both hands to gesture emphatically while continuing to talk.
